globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https://127.0.0.1:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.azurecontainerapps.io http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*
